S.FORM: M'yutak Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko M'yutak a niyaro', 50 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 133 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 126 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 7 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 89%, Amis( 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma1%, Saysiyat1%, roma1%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: mʡjo~u~utak itiniaj i *iansħi ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u mʡjo~u~utak a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis( *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%, sajsijat*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: M'yutak Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko M'yutak a niyaro', 50 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 133 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 126 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 7 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 89%, Amis( 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma1%, Saysiyat1%, roma1%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: mʡjo~u~utak itiniaj i *iansħi ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u mʡjo~u~utak a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis( *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%, sajsijat*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
